content.body: FYI: A verdict has to be explicitly pass/fail (and what differentiates it)
do you think this would be met if each of the assignment of verdict sections were preceded by "PASS if all of the following conditions are met, otherwise FAIL"?

but generally I have seen most be like:
PASS: This that and the other thing
FAIL: None of that stuff
sure, I guess I'm asking whether your comment is superficial (just saying PASS or FAIL loudly) or more deeply about the nature of the assessments
(I feel like these assessments are pretty unambiguous and such)
